findings.description: Header layout collapsed into a single column.
findings.evidence: The PDF header features a two-column layout with department information on the left and a list of officials on the right. The HTML renders all header content sequentially in a single left-aligned column.

findings.description: Significant loss of text formatting in headings.
findings.evidence: The PDF features distinct heading styles: a large blue date, a large red 'PUBLIC NOTICE', and a large bold black title. The HTML renders these elements in a much smaller, uniform size and black color, losing the visual hierarchy.
